case_title: ROBERT D RAGO VS. MARY RAGO ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF PENDING ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAGO, ROBERT D
AMENDED REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAGO, ROBERT D

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUL-29-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ROBERT RAGO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 10/2/15. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAGO, ROBERT D

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUL-22-2015 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF ROBERT RAGO'S REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 IS CONTINUED FROM JUL-22-2015 TO JUL-29-2015 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR APPLICANT TO FILE AN AMENDED APPLICATION BY 7/24/15, WITH A COPY TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 206 AFTER FILING. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT ***(COMPLAINT STRICKEN. FEES NOT PAID BY PLAINTIFF. SEE 10/13/15 ORDER)*** FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAGO, ROBERT D AS TO DEFENDANT RAGO, MARY DOES 1 TO 25 INCLUSIVE AND ALL PERSONS UNKOWN CLAIMING LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE ESTATE, LIEN, OR INTEREST IN THE REAL PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THE COMPLAINT ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE/INTEREST, OR ANY CLOUD UPON ROBERT D RAGO'S TITLE/INTEREST THERETO, NAMED HEREIN AS DOES 26 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-02-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-28-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-09-2015
